narrative:
West Chester Twp 33 (precinct in Butler County) has 787 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.8 percentage points.
